title: The Dividend Investor's Oil Playbook - Part 2
text: In this four-part series, I will review how to structure a dividend investor's oil and energy portfolio with my oil and energy playbook. Part 2 will discuss the general strategy and our second position, the running back. The playbook discusses strategies for maximizing returns throughout the commodity cycle, not just during upswings.
